summary: Iteration 99 - Action Required Dashboard Audit: All 26 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed. The action_required bucket correctly contains only participant items with 'invited' or 'accepted_pending_guarantee' status. Cancelled appointments correctly appear in 'Historique' (past) bucket, not 'À venir' (upcoming). The 'Finaliser ma garantie' button correctly navigates to appointment detail page.

backend_pytest: ✅ A. ACTION REQUIRED - INVITED: invited participants appear in action_required with accept/decline actions
✅ B. ACTION REQUIRED - PENDING GUARANTEE: accepted_pending_guarantee appears in action_required with finalize_guarantee action
✅ B. Pending guarantee items have 'Garantie en attente' label
✅ B. Specific test appointment e33bf4d6-f1f2-4bb3-bbe3-bda9af659e84 found with pending_guarantee status
✅ C. ACTION REQUIRED - EXCLUSIONS: accepted/accepted_guaranteed/declined NOT in action_required
✅ D. ACTION REQUIRED - ORGANIZER NEVER: no organizer items in action_required, all have action_required=False
✅ E. CANCELLED TO HISTORIQUE: no cancelled items in upcoming bucket
✅ E. Cancelled items correctly appear in past bucket
✅ E. Known cancelled appointments (AUDIT-SC2, AUDIT-SC5) found in past
✅ F. CANCELLED NOT ACTION_REQUIRED: no cancelled items in action_required
✅ G. DASHBOARD COUNTS: counts match bucket lengths, total is sum of all buckets
✅ I. TIMELINE CARDS: upcoming items have required fields, organizer items have participant counts
✅ J. PAST ITEMS: past items exist with required fields, sorted reverse chronological
frontend_playwright: ✅ Dashboard loads with correct stats (45 engagements à venir | 1 action requise)
✅ Action Required section shows 1 action card with 'Finaliser ma garantie' button
✅ No organizer items (remind buttons) in Action Required section
✅ À venir tab shows 44 timeline cards with 43 organizer items, 2 participant items
✅ No cancelled items in À venir tab
✅ Historique tab shows 105 items with 2 'Annulé' badges
✅ AUDIT-SC2 and AUDIT-SC5 cancelled appointments found in Historique
✅ H. FRONTEND CTA: 'Finaliser ma garantie' button navigates to /appointments/e33bf4d6-f1f2-4bb3-bbe3-bda9af659e84
✅ Appointment detail page shows participant with 'Garantie en cours' status

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend (appointments.py line 1070): action_required = p_status in ('invited', 'accepted_pending_guarantee') and not is_past and not is_cancelled - correctly includes pending_guarantee
✅ Backend (appointments.py lines 1076-1077): finalize_guarantee action added for accepted_pending_guarantee status
✅ Backend (appointments.py lines 1122-1125): _is_past_item() correctly forces cancelled appointments to past bucket
✅ Backend (appointments.py line 988): Organizer items always have action_required=False
✅ Frontend (OrganizerDashboard.js lines 197-202): ActionCard correctly shows 'Finaliser ma garantie' amber button for accepted_pending_guarantee
✅ Frontend (OrganizerDashboard.js lines 188-196): ActionCard shows Accept/Decline for invited status
seed_data_creation: Used existing test appointments created in MongoDB by previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Action Required dashboard audit complete. Key verified behaviors: (1) action_required bucket contains ONLY participant items with 'invited' or 'accepted_pending_guarantee' status, (2) cancelled appointments always go to 'past' bucket via _is_past_item() helper, (3) organizer items NEVER appear in action_required regardless of pending count, (4) 'Finaliser ma garantie' button correctly links to appointment detail page. Test appointments: e33bf4d6-f1f2-4bb3-bbe3-bda9af659e84 (pending_guarantee), 6e5233cc-4ed5-421d-a43a-e4d8fbf8df26 (accepted_guaranteed). Known cancelled appointments in Historique: AUDIT-SC2, AUDIT-SC5.

mocked_apis.Stripe: Dev mode - payment methods are pm_dev_* format
